RaffleConfig.title: RaffleConfig
RaffleConfig.description: Configuration metadata for the active raffle

title.description: The title of the raffle prize

description.description: Detailed description of the raffle prize

totalNumbers.description: Total count of numbers in the raffle grid

isActive.description: Whether the raffle is active and accepting numbers selection

imageUrl.description: URL structure for the raffle prize image

Order.title: Order
Order.description: An individual order/reservation for numbers in the raffle

id.description: The custom short ID of the order

status.description: Current payment and validation status of the order

Lock.title: Lock
Lock.description: A temporary selection lock for a raffle number

sessionId.description: Unique session identifier of the user who locked the number

expiresAt.description: Timestamp in milliseconds when the lock expires

/orders/{orderId}.description: A collection containing orders submitted by users

/locks/{numberId}.description: Collection containing temporary selection locks for numbers
